name: exocrew
description: Give beginners and solo builders an AI delivery crew that takes software from a clear task contract through implementation, testing, release, and rollback.

interface.shortDescription: Ship working software with AI, even if you do not code.
interface.longDescription: Turn a brief into working, tested, releasable software with plain-language checkpoints, engineering guardrails, cross-agent review, browser acceptance, rollback, and verified production closure.
defaultPrompt: I do not code. Use ExoCrew to turn this idea into a working, tested project. Explain decisions in plain language and protect all high-risk operations.
Turn this idea into a safe, testable delivery plan.
Review this change across product, engineering, modernization, test, and operations.
Modernize this system without losing contracts, parity, or cutover evidence.
Prepare this project for a controlled release with rollback evidence.
